name: Blarney Stones
recipeIngredient: Peanuts or Pecans, finely chopped or ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in hot milk.
2. Beat the eggs with a rotary beater until light and frothy.
3. Gradually beat in sugar, salt, vanilla extract, and the melted butter mixture.
4. Sift together flour and baking powder.
5. Quickly incorporate the sifted ingredients into the batter.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 13x9-inch pan.
7. Gently tap the pan several times to remove any air bubbles.
8. Bake for 25-35 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
9. Allow the cake to cool completely before cutting.
10. Cut the cooled cake into 4x1-inch pieces.
11. Frost all sides with icing made by mixing powdered sugar and milk to your desired consistency.
12. Roll each piece in nuts of choice, such as finely chopped or ground peanuts or pecans.
